summary: The diff implements most of the core requirements well. Backend actor (REQ-1) includes all data models and CRUD operations. Frontend (REQ-2) has all 6 pages with routing, navbar, footer, filtering, and inquiry form. Sample data seeding (REQ-3) is referenced by nextProductId=13 and nextCategoryId=6, implying seed data exists in the truncated portion. Visual theme (REQ-4) is applied with charcoal/amber/white palette, typography, and card styles. Images (REQ-5) are referenced from /assets/generated/ for hero banner, logo, and category background. A few acceptance criteria have gaps worth flagging.

missing_requirements.requirement: All data persists across canister upgrades (stable storage)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows Map.empty() for products, categories, and inquiries, and uses var counters without stable declarations. No stable var or system pre/postupgrade hooks are visible in the truncated backend file, raising a concern about upgrade persistence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store logo and hero banner rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The navbar and footer reference /assets/generated/rk-logo.dim_256x256.png and the home page references /assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1440x500.png, but the actual image files are listed as omitted from the diff due to limits. Their presence cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: updateCategory and deleteCategory functions implemented in backend
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 only specifies categories can be created and listed. The backend additionally implements updateCategory and deleteCategory which were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution link in the footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any attribution or branding for a third-party tool in the footer. This link was added without being requested.
